creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgj         2010-01-12 21:24:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/hs-ALUT        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  A Haskell binding for the OpenAL Utility Toolkit, which makes
  managing of OpenAL contexts, loading sounds in various formats
  and creating waveforms very easy. For more information about the
  C library on which this binding is based, please see:
  
  WWW: http://connect.creativelabs.com/openal/
  
  PR:             ports/142480
  Submitted by:   Jacula Modyun <jacula(at)gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1086    +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +91 -0     ports/audio/hs-ALUT/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/hs-ALUT/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/audio/hs-ALUT/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/audio/hs-ALUT/pkg-plist (new)
